data.name: Girls! Girls! Girls!?
data.detailed_description:
🌆 Welcome to Akihabara

Akihabara, the electric town--hub for state-of-the-art technology, fashion, otaku goods, and the cutest boys in skirts you will ever see. Pop into the Girls! Girls! Girls!? Cafe and fall in love with one of four charming "ladies..." or maybe even all of them? Jump into a story full of fluff, romance, friendship, and crossdressing that will keep you coming back for more!

🎁 Even More with Free DLC

Your journey doesn’t end with the base game—two free DLCs add fresh content to explore. More moments, more art, and more reasons to come back to the café.

🎨 Stunning Art & Animation

  • 35+ beautifully illustrated CGs by 骨盤少女-tommy

  • Fully animated character sprites that breathe life into every scene

  • A vibrant cast of four leads, each crafted with care and personality

📖 Hours of Romance & Replay

  • 15+ hours of story content

  • 6+ unique endings shaped by your decisions

  • Branching routes that invite you to replay and explore every possibility

💖 Choices That Truly Matter

Will you nurture trust, ignite romance, or stumble into heartbreak? Every choice sculpts your story:

  • Gentle friendships or passionate connections

  • Playful banter or tender intimacy

  • Sweet rewards… or bittersweet farewells

☕ Cozy Crossdressing Chaos

From simple headpats to deeper bonds, Girls! Girls! Girls!? celebrates the joy of connection in all its forms. Laugh, blush, and discover a romance visual novel that balances comedy, heart, and a little bit of mischief.

✨ Whether you play tonight or save it for later, your seat at the café is always waiting.

data.short_description: Welcome to 'Girls! Girls! Girls!?' cafe, where charming cross-dressing "girls" navigate love, life, and laughter. As the new manager, make lasting decisions, explore intricate and explicit relationships with each character, and discover multiple endings in a story where every choice matters.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.1
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 and Ubuntu 18.04
  • 處理器: X64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.2+ or Vulkan-capable Nvidia and AMD GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
